pericopes.pericopeTitle: [CAPTAINS SPEAK WITH GEDALIAH THE GOVERNOR][ISHMAEL OVERTAKEN BY JOHANAN]ISRAEL FLEES TO EGYPT

entries.author: Theodoret of Cyr
entries.title: A DELAYED RESPONSE FOR ISRAEL’S BENEFIT.
entries.body: Their words are full of piety but do not agree with their actions. When ten days had passed, the prophet obtained his reply. But I think that the delay of the response was for the benefit of those who had made the request, so that they might know how God barely received the supplication of the prophet. Accordingly, the prophet says that God had ordered for them to stay in that land. He says, I will deem you worthy of all care. {fn:0}
